title: Harness Engineering: What Separates Top Agentic Engineers Right Now
summary: Harness engineering is the design and orchestration of control systems around language models in agentic applications. The harness comprises the AI layer (rules, skills, hooks, subagents) around a single session and the orchestration logic that chains multiple focused agent sessions into reliable workflows. This structural approach accounts for approximately 98% of production agent systems like Claude Code.
